heading: Excessive and habitual use of intoxicants
label: 7352 Excessive and habitual use of intoxicants
text: An individual who habitually uses intoxicating beverages to excess may not be employed in the competitive service.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesDerivationU.S. CodeRevised Statutes andStatutes at Large .5 U.S.C. 640, .Jan. 16, 1883, ch. 27, § 822 Stat. 406The word “employed” is substituted for “appointed to, or retained in” because it includes both.Standard changes are made to conform with the definitions applicable and the style of this title as outlined in the preface to the report.
